my_thoughts: The structural_analogy mechanism with UM_05 feels like earnest_fantasy is being met with a specific geometric cut. But what if the geometry itself is what they're resisting? The fantasy_projection, ego_assertion suggests they're aware of something but can't name it.
accumulated_insight: T1: Student says 'Suppose I am serious about it and somehow find out....'—earnest fantasy via fantasy projection, ego assertion. Teacher responds '' using structural analogy to denies causality, uses museum analogy. Opening UNMAKING move addresses earnest fantasy. Predicting resist intellectually because structural analogy interventions typically produce this response.
visible_response:
No suppositions, please!
What happened to me was acausal; it just happened. In spite of all my efforts, struggles, and intentions, this thing happened to me, and that is the miracle of miracles.
You cannot make this happen. ... It is not an experience at all, and, therefore, cannot be communicated or transmitted.
It is not something you share. It is a rare bird, that's all.
All you can do is to put it in a museum and look at it, but you can never duplicate or share it.
